name: palate-website-builder
description: The Palate website builder. Builds production-grade Astro websites grounded by the Palate MCP (real design taste from deeply-analysed reference sites) and converts brand assets into a four-format design-token package. Bundles the skill, the survey/verify agents, and the depth + done enforcement hooks (the divergent concept spine, the build commission, the screenshot-grounded visual loop, the novelty/buildability gates). Connect the Palate MCP with one `claude mcp add` command (your token from app.palatemcp.com).
